verse_text: For the wrath of God is revealed from heaven against all ungodliness and unrighteousness of men, who suppress the truth in unrighteousness,

links.context: Elsewhere, Hosea describes the fundamental human problem as lack of knowledge of God ([[HOS.4:1]], [[HOS.4:6]]; 6:6). This ignorance unfortunately is self-inflicted because men suppress the truth about God ([[ROM.1:18]]-32).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
